title: Little Soldiers — Sheet
description: A generalized sheet for the Little Soldiers game. One of five kinds: little_soldier, general, threat, tactics_card, object. See FRAMEWORK.md for the rules grammar. v1.2 adds optional figureCandidates (collection figures, e.g. Mage Knight, that can stand in for a role).

confidence.description: Provenance of this sheet's data (mirrors FRAMEWORK.md tags).

range.description: Cord-measured. green = shortest (1 Move token); yellow = medium/standard move & grenade AoE; red = long (grants the extra attack reroll); any = no range limit (line-of-sight only).

tokenType.description: Named tokens from the Book 3 glossary + module tokens.

defense.description: Wound lands only when hits > defense. Units 2-3; Threats up to ~5.

toughness.description: Breaks when Hearts on the card >= toughness. Units 3-6.

figureCandidate.description: A physical miniature from a collection (e.g. the Mage Knight database) that can stand in for this role, so players can field roles from figures they own. See tools/match-collection.py.

name.description: Figure name as it appears in the source database (e.g. 'Utem Crossbowman').

faction.description: Source faction (e.g. Atlantis Guild, Necropolis Sect, Elemental League, Orc Raiders, Black Powder Rebels).

set.description: Expansion / set the figure belongs to (e.g. 'Rebellion', 'Lancers').

rarity.description: Rarity or rank as the source labels it (free text; Mage Knight used rarity levels and Weak/Standard/Tough ranks).

collectorNumber.description: Collector / figure number within the set, if known.

dbUrl.description: Link to the figure's page in the source database.

roleFit.description: Why this figure suits this role (which traits matched). Role assignment may be editorial.

verified.description: true once the figure's identity (name, set, collector number) is confirmed against a source listing; faction/points may still be approximate.

effect.description: One primitive of an action / ability / tactics card / object power. See FRAMEWORK.md 5.4.

count.description: How many tokens/targets/dice/attacks/moves/cards. May be negative for modify_rerolls (e.g. -1).

needsValidTarget.description: false = ignores line of sight (the grenade/mortar premium).

text.description: Required for kind=custom; otherwise a human-readable restatement.

superSoldiers.description: The Super Soldiers (back) rank. Confirmed model (Book 2 p3): ONE per-Lightning Special Ability (linear: N Lightning = N activations) + a universal Move heal. There is NO 3+Lightning 'super special' for Little Soldiers (that tier is Threat-only).

moveHeal.description: Universal: each Move a Super Soldier makes may remove 1 Heart from its card.

figureCandidates.description: Collection figures (e.g. Mage Knight) that can physically stand in for this role, so players can field it from what they own.

orderAction.description: Base: 'Play 1 Order token on one of your Little Soldiers currently in play.'

signatureTactics.description: Advanced Tactics module: the 3 Tactics cards printed on the General's back; the unit's only point of asymmetry.

figureCandidates.description: Collection figures that can physically stand in for this commander/hero.

target.description: The Target point used for line-of-sight and range to this Threat.

attack.description: Auto-attack every Threats' turn; +1 Heart to each valid target per Lightning.

superSpecialAbility.description: Threat-only tier: fires on 3+ Lightning in the collective attack.

figureCandidates.description: Collection figures that can physically stand in for this Threat/boss.

tacticsCard.description: Advanced Tactics module. orderCondition gates the card (NOT a spent cost). type Reaction is played on an opponent's turn.

orderCondition.description: Order tokens the General/Soldier must HAVE to play it (top-left number). Omit/0 = no condition (e.g. Fighting Fit).

reactionTrigger.description: Required when cardType=reaction: the moment it may be played.

object.description: Objects module. Activated when YOUR Little Soldier ends a Move in contact and no opponent is also touching it.
